name: divi5generate
description: Divi 5 toolkit: SEO-optimised page JSON generator, design/SEO reviewer, brand extract + deploy (agency starter-kit workflow), brand-guide-to-Global-Variables converter, one-command publish-and-screenshot import into any WordPress site, Theme Builder templates (dynamic-content detail/record pages scoped by post type or taxonomy), plus Divi 5 plugin/custom-module development and a Theatre.js motion engine.
